examples: The Patriots won Super Bowl XXXIX in February, their third championship in four years.
Former Philadelphia Eagles wide receiver Freddie Mitchell never got that Super Bowl ring he wanted, despite making an appearance in Super Bowl XXXIX, but he did land in some super trouble.
The most impressive spike came for former Beatle Paul McCartney, whose Back in the U.S. album saw a 542% rise in sales in the week after Super Bowl XXXIX in 2005.
